title: Taxi Skradin to Dubrovnik Airport | Fixed €485 Transfer | TAXI Antonio
description: Private taxi and transfer from Skradin to Dubrovnik Airport. Fixed €485 per car, up to 4 passengers, door to door. Book direct with Antonio.
keywords: taxi skradin to dubrovnik airport, transfer skradin to dubrovnik airport, skradin to dubrovnik airport taxi, skradin to dubrovnik airport transfer

schema.name: Taxi Skradin to Dubrovnik Airport
schema.description: Private, fixed-price taxi and transfer from Skradin to Dubrovnik Airport, 485 euros per car for up to 4 passengers, door to door.

offers.description: One-way private transfer from Skradin to Dubrovnik Airport, per car for up to 4 passengers. Return 970 euros.

mainEntity.name: How far is Dubrovnik Airport from Skradin, and how long is the drive?

acceptedAnswer.text: The drive from Skradin to Dubrovnik Airport is around 306 km and takes roughly 4 h 20 min in normal traffic, a little longer at busy times in summer. I plan the pickup so a slow patch never leaves you rushed.

mainEntity.name: How much is a taxi from Skradin to Dubrovnik Airport?

acceptedAnswer.text: A fixed 485 per car, one way, for up to 4 passengers. The price is per vehicle, not per person, and includes tolls, fuel and luggage. A return trip is 970.

mainEntity.name: What time should I leave Skradin for my flight?

acceptedAnswer.text: As a rule, about 3 hours before an international flight and 2 hours before a domestic one. Tell me your flight time and I will confirm the exact pickup.

mainEntity.name: Do you drop us right at the departures terminal?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. I take you straight to the departures drop-off at Dubrovnik Airport and help with your luggage. No parking walk, no shuttle.

mainEntity.name: Can you drop off at the private jet terminal?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. As well as the main commercial terminal, I serve the private and general-aviation terminal used for private jets and charter flights. Tell me your terminal when you book and I take you to the right entrance.

mainEntity.name: How far in advance should I book?

acceptedAnswer.text: At least 2 hours ahead so I can confirm the car and your pickup, and earlier for early-morning flights and high season. For a sooner ride, call or WhatsApp me directly.
